mean_cn: n.（相同兴趣、职业等的人形成的）圈子，界
mean_en: a line that is curved so that its ends meet and every point on the line is the same distance from the center
sentence: She has a wide circle of friends to watch football games with her.
sentence_trans: 她有很多圈内的朋友跟她一起看足球比赛。
word_etyma: circ环 + le名词后缀 → circle圆圈
